mapper.sql: AA.CODE , AA.CODE_NM_KO , AA.CODE_NM_EN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.CODE), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.CODE_NM_KO), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.CODE_NM_EN), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.mltln.mapper.MltlnDAO.isHaveCode */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MLTLN_MST AA WHERE AA.CODE = REPLACE(TRIM(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), ' ', '')
